name: Capstone Copper Corp.
analysis: CSC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$14.6247. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$14.8638 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$14.6247, stop A$12.6522, target A$14.9000. Risk/reward is 0.14:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
